# Media Library


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## MediaLibrary Class

A unified facade that combines
[`MediaScanner`](https://cj-mills.github.io/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/media/scanner.html#mediascanner)
and
[`MediaMounter`](https://cj-mills.github.io/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/media/mounter.html#mediamounter)
functionality. Provides a simple interface for browsing media files and
accessing their URLs.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

href="https://github.com/cj-mills/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/blob/main/cjm_fasthtml_workflow_transcription_single_file/media/library.py#L21"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>
